name: 14" Rosemary Artificial Plant - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Creating a serene ambience by adding this Rosemary Artificial Plant from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This artificial plant features faux rosemary leaves, creating a realistic look, and comes in a ribbed ceramic pot with speckles for a raw, earthy finish. Designed for indoor use only, you can place it on a tabletop or entryway table for an eye-catching display.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
